name: Grafana dashboard JSON
description: Ship a ready-to-import Grafana dashboard JSON that visualizes the Prometheus metrics added in prometheus-metrics. Operators can import it as-is; it provides request rate + p95 latency, upload throughput, transcode queue depth + duration, RPC latency, connected device count, and worker health panels.
acceptance_criteria: docs/grafana-dashboard.json is a valid Grafana v9+ dashboard JSON targeting a Prometheus datasource

Panels include: HTTP request rate by status, HTTP p50/p95/p99 latency, upload bytes/s by device, transcode duration histogram, RPC call duration by method, connected devices, worker run duration by worker name, error-rate panel
Dashboard has a $datasource Prometheus template variable so import works without editing
docs/DEPLOYMENT.md gains a 'Monitoring' subsection with one paragraph + import steps
The JSON passes jq '.' (valid JSON) and the file is checked into the repo
Manual check: import into a Grafana instance pointed at the running server -> panels render (document this in a PR screenshot when opening the PR)
